title: Minimum Moves to Convert String
titleCn: 转换字符串的最少操作次数

testcases.input: s = "XXX" Output: 1 Explanation: XXX -> OOO We select all the 3 characters and convert them in one move.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: XXX -> OOO We select all the 3 characters and convert them in one move.

testcases.input: s = "XXOX" Output: 2 Explanation: XXOX -> OOOX -> OOOO We select the first 3 characters in the first move, and convert them to 'O'. Then we select the last 3 characters and convert them so that the final string contains all 'O's.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: XXOX -> OOOX -> OOOO We select the first 3 characters in the first move, and convert them to 'O'. Then we select the last 3 characters and convert them so that the final string contains all 'O's.

testcases.input: s = "OOOO" Output: 0 Explanation: There are no 'X's in s to convert.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: There are no 'X's in s to convert.
